# FrootAI MCP Server

> The open glue for the GenAI ecosystem. 45 MCP tools, 18 knowledge modules, 100 solution plays, 860+ AI primitives.

## Install

```
npx frootai-mcp
```

## What It Does

FrootAI gives your AI agent (Copilot, Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini) instant access to curated AI architecture knowledge, Azure AI service guidance, solution play scaffolding, and a plugin marketplace — all through the Model Context Protocol.

## 45 Tools in 7 Categories

- Knowledge (6): Browse 18 FROOT modules, search content, lookup 200+ AI terms
- Live (4): Fetch Azure docs, discover MCP servers, browse plays from GitHub
- Agent Chain (3): Build → Review → Tune workflow
- Ecosystem (10): Model catalog, pricing, cost estimates, comparisons, architecture diagrams
- FAI Engine (6): Wire plays through FAI Protocol, validate manifests, evaluate quality
- Scaffold (3): Generate complete solution plays (24+ files), create primitives
- Marketplace (13): Search, install, publish, compose 77+ AI primitive plugins

## Key Features

- Works offline — 688KB bundled knowledge base
- HTTP transport — run as remote server: `npx frootai-mcp http`
- TypeScript source — strict mode, 38 tests
- OpenTelemetry — opt-in observability
- Health probes — /healthz, /readyz (k8s-compatible)
- API key auth — FAI_AUTH_MODE=apikey

## Links

- Website: https://frootai.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/frootai/frootai
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/frootai-mcp
- Docs: https://frootai.dev/mcp-tooling
